name: Golden Land Forever!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>永</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>と</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>久</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>輝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かがや</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>けし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>郷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated, while you control an "Eldlich" monster: Tribute 1 Zombie monster; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only activate 1 "Golden Land Forever!" per turn.
eff: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated, while you control an "Eldlich" monster: Tribute 1 Zombie monster; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only activate 1 "Golden Land Forever!" per turn.

mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
